relationship_timeline:
Here is the updated digest:

• Recurring struggle: Work-related stress remains a challenge for Tony; his dad has been supportive in offering guidance and encouragement.
• Notable win: Tony's recent open conversation about family dynamics led to a deeper understanding between them, improving their relationship.
• Follow-up on 2024-06-09: The dad is still checking in with Tony to ensure he's doing okay, as discussed previously.
• Ongoing movement: Both parties are committed to maintaining regular check-ins to address any new challenges or celebrate successes.
